abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the machine. Make sure it is powered on and in range.
error.cannot_pair: Pairing failed. Make sure you are holding the Bluetooth button on the machine when you click Submit.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Pair {name}
bluetooth_confirm.description:
**{name}** was found.

Hold the Bluetooth button on the machine until the light blinks, then click Submit to pair.

user.title: Pair Nespresso
user.description: Select your Nespresso machine below, then hold the Bluetooth button on the machine until it blinks and click Submit.

init.title: Nespresso Options
init.description: Optionally override the auth token, or tick Re-pair to redo Bluetooth pairing.

repair.title: Re-pair
repair.description: Hold the Bluetooth button on the machine until it blinks, then click Submit to re-pair ({address}).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the machine.
error.cannot_pair: Pairing failed. Hold the Bluetooth button and try again.
